mapper.insert: insert into cert(cert_email, cert_number, cert_time) values(#{certEmail}, #{certNumber}, CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS TIMESTAMP))
mapper.update: update cert set cert_number=#{certNumber}, cert_time = CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS TIMESTAMP) where cert_email = #{certEmail}
